requirement: The authoritative component shall be a representative forward pylon-to-wingbox attachment fitting
The program shall not claim OEM geometry loads certification or FAA compliance
Every released load shall identify provenance load level coordinate frame and revision
Each accepted load case shall satisfy reaction force and moment equilibrium within predeclared tolerance
Classical checks shall precede production FEA
Classical checks shall include net section bearing shear-out pin shear fastener interaction plate bending and prying
CAD shall be parametric and revision controlled
The design shall define functional datums GD&T and semantic PMI
FE methods shall pass patch cantilever plate equilibrium and contact-resultant checks
The production model shall record mesh nonlinear and contact convergence
Every margin row shall trace to source load case geometry revision extraction rule allowable and factor
Fatigue screening shall include a spectrum mean-stress method and Miner damage
Crack-growth work shall be labeled screening and include flaw and model sensitivity
The program shall include modal and buckling analyses with analytical checks
Optimization shall include uncertainty and manufacturability constraints
The authoritative revision shall link requirements CAD PMI analysis inspection and nonconformance evidence
At least three synthetic nonconformance cases shall receive structural disposition and RCCA
Public experimental correlation shall preserve pre-correlation and post-correlation results
